title: aphanocalyx microphyllus
intro: Aphanocalyx microphyllus, a species of plant belonging to the family Olacaceae, is a tree or shrub native to New Guinea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Aphanocalyx microphyllus has been found to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or infused oil, which is used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
